headline: Why is the SEC taking so long on tokenized stocks? TD Cowen explains
summary: Investing.com -- TD Cowen said it still expects the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to approve exemptive relief for tokenized equity trading in the coming months, despite a slower-than-expected rollout of the regulatory framework.
